artifacts.summary: Comprehensive audit of 15+ Lean files and ROAD_MAP.md identifying where CanonicalMCS is conflated with the temporal domain D. Found 6 high-priority files, 5 medium-priority files. Root cause: overloaded type parameter name D and FMCSDef.lean time language predating CanonicalFMCS construction. SeparatedTaskFrame.lean and CanonicalConstruction.lean already use the correct distinction.

partial_progress.details: Full codebase audit of CanonicalMCS role confusion across active Lean files and documentation
